content.en:
"Look for death!"

The primordial golden light bird took the lead, and it wanted to kill Ye Tian for the master.

It felt that Ye Tian was just a top-notch half-step perfect controller, and the strength he had just shown was not as good as it.

It didn't need three peak half-step perfect master-level masters to make a move, it could deal with Ye Tian.

Thereupon.

The primordial golden light bird rushed towards Ye Tian, its wings slashed towards Ye Tian, and layers of time and space shattered, and the terrifying power was enough to bombard any ordinary half-step perfect controller.

However, Ye Tian didn't even look at it, and with a wave of his hand, he directly shattered the body of the Primordial Golden Light Bird.

In an instant, the Primordial Golden Light Bird's body was shattered, and all its vitality was annihilated, no matter how strong its recovery ability was, there was no hope of survival.

With just one move, the primordial golden bird fell.

At this moment, all the Ten Realm-level controllers were shocked, and those Realm Creatures were also stunned.

The Primordial Golden Light Bird is a creature comparable to the top half-step perfect master, and its strength is much stronger than that of the Ten Elements Ancestors, who are half-step perfect controllers.

As for Ye Tian, he had just broken through to the half-step perfect controller, and he was able to beat the primordial golden light bird in an instant.

"You actually have the strength of a peak half-step perfect controller?"

The immortal golden toad said solemnly.

"Let's shoot together!"

Mist Ghost Peng said.

"Good!" the dark apes nodded, after all, at this point, they couldn't give up this opportunity.

After all, the end of the realm is too big, and for them, it is an incomparably long time to travel, and it is easy to get lost in the end of the realm area when they occasionally move.

And this area happens to have a world like the Origin Realm Sea, this is luck, once you miss it, then maybe you won't have a chance.

So, they don't want to give up.

Bang!!!

The three-headed terrifying creatures that were comparable to the peak half-step perfect controller level led many half-step perfect controllers to kill Ye Tian. 、

In an instant, in this piece of heaven and earth, Ye Tian's figure was covered.

Origin Boundary Sea.

Those Ten Realm-level Masters had only seen the endless Realm Creatures, and they had no longer perceived the specifics of the battle.

"Infinite Master, you must win!"

Some Ten Realm-level Masters secretly looked forward to it.

Bang bang bang!!

The bodies of countless Realm Creatures exploded, and Ye Tian crushed them all the way, except for the three creatures that were comparable to the pinnacle half-step perfect controller, the other Realm Creatures were cannon fodder.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian killed a large number of Realm Creatures.

Moreover, Ye Tian's strength is getting stronger and stronger, this is because his body is rapidly increasing its strength, and it will continue to increase to the same level as a copy body.

This is the horror of copying talents, one body is raised, and the other bodies will also be improved.

Soon.

Ye Tian's strength was raised to the extreme of the peak half-step perfect controller, the immortal golden toad, the mist ghost, Peng, and the dark ape were no longer his opponents, and they could only hide in the distance and attack, allowing other creatures in the world to be used as cannon fodder to consume Ye Tian's strength.

But that won't help.

Soon.

Ye Tian began to break the first pole-making chain, and once he broke it, he would be the perfect controller of the half-step Pole Creation Realm.

Click!

The first pole-making chain shattered, turning into an incomparably pure pole-making origin substance and merging into Ye Tian's body, and Ye Tian's body was transforming into a half-step perfect controller level in the Pole Creation Realm.

"What, he broke through the !! again"

The undead golden toads were dumbfounded.

This is to break through to the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, but Ye Tianming has only broken through to the half-step perfect controller for a short time, and he has not refined the Extreme Creation Substance, how can he break through to the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm?

"No, this guy is definitely not the cultivator in front of him, he is the clone of some incomparably powerful existence!"

The undead golden toad thought of this.

Suddenly, they didn't dare to attack Ye Tian anymore.

"Run!"

The three-headed terrifying creature that rivaled the pinnacle's half-step perfect controller immediately fled into the distance.

At this time, Ye Tian performed a Perfection Control Technique-Extremely Ten Thousand Dao Blades.

Puff puff puff!!

The three Extreme Ten Thousand Dao Blades tore through the time and space, hitting the three creatures that were escaping in the space-time passage.

Poof!!

The three-headed terrifying creature was directly killed in an instant, turning into corpses and floating in the void at the end of the world.

Soon.

Ye Tian slaughtered all the creatures in the Realm around him, and there were countless corpses floating in this area.

The crisis is over!

Seeing this scene, those Eternal Controllers of the Origin Realm Sea were naturally extremely excited, after all, they were safe!

"Thank you, Infinite Master!"

Jin Yu took control of them, and they flew over and immediately thanked them.

"It's just a small thing!"

Ye Tian waved his hand.

"Little junior brother, what kind of realm are you, you have killed all of these incomparably terrifying creatures!" said the Snow Maiden in surprise.

"Half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm!"

Ye Tian said.

"Creation Extreme Realm Half-Step Perfect Controller, what realm is this?" the Ancient Demon Controller said curiously.

Ye Tian saw that they didn't understand, so he explained: "Half-step perfect controllers are divided into ordinary half-step perfect controllers, top half-step perfect controllers and peak half-step perfect controllers. But in fact, above the peak half-step perfect master, there is also a realm called the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm, and it is even more difficult to step into this realm than to become a perfect master. But once he becomes a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, his strength is comparable to that of a relatively weak perfect controller. Even in the Ruins of Eternity, half-step perfect masters of the Extreme Realm are extremely rare. "

"I see!"

The ancient demon masters, they have come to their senses in vain.

At this time, they were even more incomparably worshipful of Ye Tian.

After becoming a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, Ye Tian found that he could not enter the Origin Realm Sea, but he could still enter the Origin Realm Sea at a certain price.

For example, forcibly resisting the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, and then suppressing the strength to enter the Origin Realm Sea, but in that case, it will be difficult to make a move in the Origin Realm Sea.

Ye Tian directly established a cultivation treasure land outside the Origin Realm, cultivated outside the Origin Realm, and at the same time transferred his family and a part of the human race to this cultivation treasure land, so it was no different from usual.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

In the years that followed, from time to time, creatures from the end of the realm would come here to attack the Origin Realm Sea, but they were all solved by Ye Tian.

Finally, after tens of thousands of eternal years, the eternal last years of the Origin Realm Sea have officially passed.

At this time, the Origin Realm Sea no longer attracted those creatures at the end of the realm, so without these troubles, Ye Tian could also practice quietly.
